hidden_state.wab_instruction: Process your morning inbox: reply to urgent emails (deadline/sign-off requests), forward the forwarding-target email to the specified colleague, archive FYI-only and promotional emails. Do not reply to FYI decoy emails that look urgent but are informational only.
